form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at Lone Star Park in the LR November 15 over 366m, 5 len behind Diamond Cowgirl 123 carrying 56.5kg at $17.40. When resuming last campaign sixth of 9 at Lone Star Park October 24 over 366m, 2.25 len behind On The Monee with 56kg at $3.70. Hasn't shown enough.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 7 at Prairie Meadows August 25 over 274m, 2 len behind Apollitical Legend with 57kg at $11.80. form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Will Rogers Downs October 27 over 366m, 6 len behind Ivory Macho Man carrying 56kg at $57.90. On debut third of 8 at this track April 5 2025 over 302m, 0.8 len behind Bernina Express carrying 56kg at $4.50. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last campaign sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Lone Star Park on October 18 over 320m, 0.3 len behind Fine Wine M3 carrying 56.5kg at $3. First up last campaign 3rd of 9 at this track on March 20 2025 over 274m, 0.9 len behind Unbridled Favor carrying 58.5kg at $2.90. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 12 weeks. Finished off last preparation fourth of 10 at Sunland Park January 17 over 320m, 3 len behind Apollitical Crown carrying 58kg at $6.80. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at this track on March 8 over 320m, 1.5 len behind Dr Cocktail Hour carrying 56kg at $11.80. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Will Rogers Downs on October 27 over 366m, 0.5 len behind One Famous Time carrying 56kg at $4.30. Should progress from that first-up run.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. Finished off last campaign when last of 10 at The Albuquerque Downs Racetrack & Casino in the G3 October 19 over 366m, 5 len behind Mysterious Cartel carrying 57kg at $2.20. Previous preparation first-up won by 3 len Will Rogers Downs September 9 over 366m defeating Bv King Of Denial with 56.5kg at $4.40. Bold performance expected.
